title: Session type catalog
description: Reference table of the 11 session_type enum values with descriptions + typical durations + coach requirements + entitlement gating. Loaded by SessionProvisioner + rendered on the create form.

practice.label: Practice
practice.description: Recurring team practice. Head coach required. Attendance tracked but billing runs through team membership (not per-session).

lesson.label: Lesson
lesson.description: Generic instructional session. Requires head coach.

class.label: Class
class.description: Scheduled class (yoga, spin, aerobics). Requires head coach. Billing via class pass or membership.

private_lesson.label: Private lesson
private_lesson.description: 1:1 lesson. Requires head coach. Billed per session. Medium+ entitlement.

group_lesson.label: Group lesson
group_lesson.description: Small-group lesson (typically 2-6 athletes). Requires head coach. Billed per session. Medium+ entitlement.

drop_in.label: Drop-in
drop_in.description: Open session, no coach required. Attendance via drop-in day-pass.

workshop.label: Workshop
workshop.description: Skill-focused workshop. Head coach required. Standalone billing.

trial.label: Trial
trial.description: Prospect trial session. Head coach required. Free or deposit-refundable.

assessment.label: Assessment
assessment.description: Athlete skill assessment. Coach evaluates + writes recap notes.

game.label: Game
game.description: Competitive game / match. Head coach required (referee = staff role). Bundled with team membership.

open_gym.label: Open gym
open_gym.description: Unstaffed open access. No coach. Attendance via day-pass or facility membership.
